strengths: 15+ years across full-stack, with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React experience
Active AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, workshops, custom test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotics era)
Cloud experience narrow — AWS CDK noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear
response.justification: Candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack experience, recent TypeScript/Node/React work at Optilyz and re:cinq, and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP tooling work that matches the role's agent-development requirement. Testing rigor and architectural maturity are evident. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent).
